/usr/bin/c++ -fsanitize=address,undefined -fno-omit-frame-pointer -g -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/kairo_tests.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/kairo_tests.dir/test_main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_tests.dir/test_math.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_tests.dir/test_ecs.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_tests.dir/test_physics.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_tests.dir/test_events.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_tests.dir/test_memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_tests.dir/test_gameplay.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_tests.dir/test_phase9.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_tests.dir/test_phase11.cpp.o CMakeFiles/kairo_tests.dir/test_phase12.cpp.o -o ../bin/kairo_tests  ../engine/libkairo_engine.a ../libglad.a ../libstb.a ../libimgui.a /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libglfw.so.3.3 ../liblua.a ../libminiaudio.a -ldl -lm /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libGLX.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libOpenGL.so -lpthread
